purpose: Skills for using ESData MCP as an official evidence layer while keeping reasoning, workflow, and human review gates outside the MCP core.

source_policy.mcp_core: Only official, loaded, traceable ESData evidence may support authoritative claims.
source_policy.skills: Skills provide workflow, cold-start questions, output structure, and human review gates. They are not legal or tax authority.
source_policy.search_discovery: SearXNG or web search may only create discovery candidates. A worker must verify and load candidates before use as evidence.

openai_best_practices.skill_shape: Each skill is a directory with a required SKILL.md, optional references, and optional agents/openai.yaml metadata.
openai_best_practices.progressive_disclosure: Core instructions stay in SKILL.md; detailed contract notes live in references only where useful.
openai_best_practices.focused_scope: Each skill has one primary workflow: truth contract, tax review, sociedad de valores review, FATCA/CRS, regulatory monitoring, or KYC/AML.
openai_best_practices.zip_distribution: Each skill is packaged as an individual zip with SKILL.md at the archive root, and the bundle zip includes skills, zips, and config.
openai_best_practices.codex_install: See config/codex-install.md for repository or user skill discovery locations.
openai_best_practices.api_mounting: See config/responses-api-skills-example.json for a shell-tool skill mounting example.

skills.name: esdata-mcp-truth-contract
skills.use_for: Global evidence/reasoning separation and verified/completeness handling.

skills.name: esdata-tax-obligation-review
skills.use_for: Spanish AEAT model, casilla, and tax obligation analysis.

skills.name: esdata-sociedad-valores-review
skills.use_for: Sociedad de valores resident/non-resident, CNMV, MiFID, AEAT, FATCA/CRS questions.

skills.name: esdata-regulatory-monitoring
skills.use_for: Regulatory digest, source monitoring, verified changes and discovery staging.

skills.name: esdata-kyc-aml-review
skills.use_for: KYC/AML onboarding triage with ESData evidence and compliance review gates.

adapted_patterns: human review gate before legal, tax, filing, reporting, or client-facing reliance
cold-start context gathering before applicability conclusions
regulatory feed digest with verified/discovery separation
